mapper.insert:
insert into store_material_log(repertory_id, operation, num, source_type, source_id) values
(#{log.repertoryId},#{log.operation},#{log.num},#{log.sourceType},#{log.sourceId})

insert into store_amend_detail(amend_id, repertory_id, num) values
(#{item.amendId},#{item.repertoryId},#{item.num})
mapper.update:
update enquiry
applicant_id = #{applicantId},
dept_id = #{deptId},
store_id = #{storeId},
no = #{no},
amount = #{amount},
pay_type = #{payType},
state = #{state},
attachment = #{attachment},
req_cause = #{reqCause},
resp_cause = #{respCause},
remark = #{remark},
where id = #{id}

update store_material set sum = sum + case
when material_id = #{item.materialId} and store_id = #{item.storeId} then #{item.num}
end where (store_id,material_id) IN
(#{item.storeId},#{item.materialId})

update store_material set sum = sum + case id
when #{item.repertoryId} then #{item.num}
end where id IN
#{item.repertoryId}
AND CASE id
WHEN #{item.repertoryId} THEN sum + #{item.num} 1
ELSE 1 END >= 0
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM store
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{name},'%')
AND dept_id IN
#{deptId}

select count(*) from store_material sm join material m on sm.material_id = m.id left join material_class mc on m.class_id = mc.id
sm.store_id = #{id}
AND m.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{name},'%')
AND mc.name like CONCAT('%',#{className},'%')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM outbound o join user_info ui on o.stocker_id = ui.user_id join store s on o.store_out_id = s.id join dept d on s.dept_id = d.id
AND o.store_out_id IN
#{storeId}
AND o.no like concat(#{no},'%')
AND ui.name like concat('%',#{stocker},'%')
AND s.name like concat('%',#{store},'%')
AND d.name like concat('%',#{dept},'%')
AND o.state = #{state}
